div.head: The Secretary of State to the Vice Consul at Kunming (Lutkins)Repeated to the Chargé in China and the Vice Consul at Chungking as telegrams Nos. telCan 566 and 65, respectively.
div.p: 62. Assume Deptel 61 Aug 12Same as telegram No. 62 to Chungking, supra. answers query raised urtel 122 Aug. 10. Re question raised urtel 123, Aug. 10 Dept desires you maintain Consulate long as possible but you shld keep in mind possibility local deal engineered by Lu HanGovernor of Yunnan. and/or Lung YunGovernor of Yunnan, 1927–45. adherents by which peaceful turnover wld occur prior advance Commie troops that area. Such contingency is one which Dept of course in no position foresee and must under these circumstances rely upon ur judgment and estimate situation.
